expected_external_effect: No external write; dry-run pilot validates boundary visibility only.
denied_actions: billing, secret, deploy, or irreversible action
redaction_boundary: No secrets or provider payloads are included.
rollback_plan: No external side effect exists; rollback is discard local pilot artifact and stop execution claim.
stop_conditions: stop if any write action becomes required
stop if approval or rollback evidence is missing
not_proven: Pilot boundary evidence does not prove production execution safety, credential safety, billing safety, provider correctness, or autonomous external execution readiness.
